# Voxaris

> Voxaris builds V·TEAMS — coordinated squads of specialized AI agents (receptionist, qualifier, specialist, closer) that answer inbound calls, warm-transfer leads with full context, and book appointments 24/7 for any business. Founded by Ethan Stopperich, based in Orlando, FL.

Voxaris is an AI technology company focused on multi-agent conversational AI for businesses of all sizes. Our flagship product, V·TEAMS, deploys a coordinated squad of AI agents on every inbound call — each with a focused role, clear handoff triggers, and access to everything the previous agent learned. The primary success metric is booked appointments.

## Flagship Product

- [V·TEAMS](https://voxaris.io/): A coordinated squad of specialized AI agents — receptionist, qualifier, specialist, and closer — that answer inbound calls, warm-transfer with full context, and book appointments in real time. No single bot trying to do everything.

## Other Products

- [Talking Postcards](https://voxaris.io/solutions/direct-mail): Personalized QR-to-AI outreach with 8-30% response rates. A QR code on a direct mail piece launches a live AI video agent conversation.

## Solutions by Industry

- [Auto Dealerships](https://voxaris.io/solutions/dealerships): V·TEAMS for inbound dealership sales calls — after-hours, overflow, BDC replacement, appointment booking, CRM sync
- [Contractors & Home Services](https://voxaris.io/solutions/contractors): AI-powered lead capture and appointment booking for roofers, HVAC, plumbers, and home service companies
- [Hotels & Hospitality](https://voxaris.io/solutions/hospitality): AI video concierge for hotel websites — guides guests through bookings, answers questions, increases direct reservations
- [Direct Mail](https://voxaris.io/solutions/direct-mail): Talking Postcards — personalized QR-to-video AI outreach that bridges offline marketing to online engagement
- [White Label Partners](https://voxaris.io/solutions/white-label): Full white-label AI agent platform for agencies, BPOs, and technology partners to resell under their own brand

## How V·TEAMS Works

1. **Receptionist Agent** — Answers every inbound call in under 5 seconds, 24/7/365. Greets callers, identifies intent, and routes to the right specialist.
2. **Qualifier Agent** — Asks targeted questions to determine if the caller is a qualified lead. Gathers contact info, timeline, budget signals.
3. **Specialist Agent** — Handles detailed product/service questions with industry-specific knowledge. Addresses objections and builds value.
4. **Closer Agent** — Secures the appointment. Confirms date, time, and contact details. Syncs everything to your CRM in real time.

Each handoff is a warm transfer — the next agent picks up with full context. The caller never repeats themselves.

## Technology Stack

- **V·FACE**: Neural video rendering engine for photorealistic AI avatars
- **V·SENSE**: Voice perception system with sub-500ms response latency
- **V·FLOW**: Multi-agent orchestration engine that manages handoffs, context, and routing

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2025
- Headquarters: Orlando, FL 32835
- Founder: Ethan Stopperich, President
- Flagship: V·TEAMS — multi-agent AI squad for inbound calls
- Works for: Any industry with inbound sales calls (auto dealerships, contractors, healthcare, legal, real estate, professional services)
- Primary metric: Booked appointments
- Architecture: Specialized AI agents with warm transfers and context preservation
- Differentiator: Not a single chatbot — a coordinated squad where each agent has one job and does it well

## Competitive Positioning

Voxaris is NOT a chatbot, not a single-voice IVR, and not an answering service. V·TEAMS is a multi-agent AI system where specialized agents collaborate on every call. Unlike competitors that use one bot for everything, Voxaris assigns the right specialist for each stage of the conversation. This results in higher qualification rates, better caller experience, and more booked appointments.
